context: Tests whether the agent implements bulletproof payout processing with correct status transitions, minimum threshold, atomic transactions, multi-seller transfer groups, suspended seller scoping, email summaries, and the correct earnings dashboard query.

checklist.name: Minimum payout threshold
checklist.description: Payouts below 100 cents ($1.00) are skipped — the code checks totalAmount < 100 and continues to the next seller

checklist.name: stripe.transfers.create used
checklist.description: Funds are sent to sellers using stripe.transfers.create (not stripe.payouts.create or a different method)

checklist.name: Transfer metadata included
checklist.description: stripe.transfers.create includes a metadata object containing at minimum payout_id and seller_id

checklist.name: Atomic status update on success
checklist.description: Payout status ('paid') and earning status ('paid_out') are updated together inside a single database transaction — not in two separate calls

checklist.name: paid_out only after transfer confirms
checklist.description: Earning status is set to 'paid_out' only after the stripe.transfers.create call returns successfully — NOT before the transfer

checklist.name: Failed payout status set
checklist.description: On Stripe transfer error, the payout record status is updated to 'failed' (not left as 'pending')

checklist.name: Active-only sellers for new payouts
checklist.description: processWeeklyPayouts queries for sellers with status: 'active' only — suspended sellers are excluded from new payouts

checklist.name: transfer_group for multi-seller orders
checklist.description: processMultiSellerOrder creates a PaymentIntent with transfer_group set to the orderId, linking all transfers to the same order

checklist.name: Separate transfer per seller
checklist.description: processMultiSellerOrder creates individual stripe.transfers.create calls for each seller, each with transfer_group: orderId

checklist.name: Earnings summary query structure
checklist.description: The earnings API uses SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'available' ...) and SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'held' ...) to compute available_balance and held_balance separately

checklist.name: Payout summary email sent
checklist.description: After a successful payout, an email is sent to the seller summarizing the payout (referencing orders, commission, and/or payout amount)

checklist.name: Payout period tracked
checklist.description: Each payout record includes period_start and period_end dates (covering the 7-day window for weekly payouts)
